## Traceability

## Checklist
- [ ] Any new canonical model has a schema **and** a validating example.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys added.
- [ ] Architecturally significant decisions have an ADR.
- [ ] Localized text (if any) is generated, not used for logic.
